source: iteration 2 — ring segment click test failed: arcs invisible to the testing agent's interactive-element extraction
lesson: Clickable SVG parts need role=button + tabIndex=0 + key handler, and the ancestor svg must not carry role=img (it flattens the subtree to presentational).

source: iteration 3 — orbit-motion assertion failed: cloud browsers may run reduced-motion, and screenshot-sampled motion checks are flaky
lesson: Never cloud-assert continuous ambient motion; assert the settled end-state. Decoration animation is progressive enhancement, verified locally.

source: iteration 5 — runs returned status blocked while the agent's own conclusion said PASS with all steps green (platform quirk, reported upstream)
lesson: Audit the checker's verdict against its observations: a status flag that contradicts its own evidence gets one fresh run, then record what the evidence shows and report the discrepancy.
